stateNote.PENDING_PAYMENT: This session is still waiting for payment, so there is no direct action required right now.

stateNote.UNAVAILABLE: The session is not available right now.

nextStep.waitForPayment: Wait for payment to complete before any operational step.
nextStep.waitForConfirmation: Check back later when the session moves to a confirmed schedule.
nextStep.waitForWindow: Return when the appointment time gets closer to see whether the join window has opened.
nextStep.prepareRoom: Prepare the room first, then check whether joining is available.
nextStep.checkJoin: Check join availability now to see whether the session is ready to open.
nextStep.openRoom: Open the room and start the appointment.
nextStep.reviewOnly: Review the details only. No further operational action is needed right now.

actionSummary.openRoom: You can open the session room now without any extra step.
actionSummary.prepareRoom: The next clear step is to prepare the session room.
actionSummary.checkJoin: Check join availability to see whether the session window is open now.
actionSummary.closeout: You can update the session outcome if it ended or if the patient did not attend.
actionSummary.messages: You can open the session messages now and review the related conversation.
actionSummary.none: This screen shows the current truth of the session, but no operational action is required right now.

closeoutSummary.COMPLETED: This session is already closed and does not need any additional closeout.
closeoutSummary.NO_SHOW: This session was already marked as no-show and does not need another update.
closeoutSummary.CLOSED: This session is already closed, so there are no extra closeout actions.
closeoutSummary.NOT_READY: Closeout actions only appear when the session reaches a state that allows them.

blockingReasons.SESSION_COMPLETED: A completed session cannot be cancelled.
blockingReasons.SESSION_IN_PROGRESS: A session that is in progress cannot be cancelled.

hints.available: An amount ready for financial follow-up or payout.

promoCodes.title: Promo Codes
promoCodes.subtitle: Create promo codes in one compact place.
promoCodes.financialNote: Promo discounts are percentage-only and capped at 20%.
promoCodes.errorBody: Try again to sync your practitioner promo codes.

empty.title: You have not created any promo codes yet.
empty.body: Create at least one code to get started.

list.noDateWindow: No start or end date set

activate.title: Activate promo code
activate.body: This code will become active again and can be used once more.

disable.title: Disable promo code
disable.body: Are you sure you want to disable this code? Patients will not be able to use it afterward.

notifications.createdBody: {{code}} is now available to your patients.
notifications.actionFailedBody: Could not complete the action. Please try again.

form.subtitle: Keep the code percentage-only, session-only, and within the 20% limit.
form.note: Backend validation still decides the final result. The mobile form only helps you prepare a safe request.
form.codeHint: Use letters and numbers only. You may also use - or _.
form.codeReadOnlyHint: The code is read-only after creation.
form.discountHint: Promo codes are percentage-only, with a maximum of 20%.
form.discountReadOnlyHint: This discount is read-only because the code has already been redeemed.
form.totalLimitHint: Leave blank if there is no total usage limit.
form.patientLimitHint: Leave blank if patients may reuse the code without a per-patient cap.
form.startsAtHint: Leave it blank to start the code immediately.
form.endsAtHint: Leave it blank if the code has no expiry date.
form.activeHint: Turn this off to create the code in a disabled state.

errors.invalidRange: The end date must be on or after the start date.
errors.locked: The discount can no longer be changed because this code has already been redeemed.

detail.title: Promo code details
detail.errorTitle: Could not load promo code details
detail.errorBody: Try again to load the details and redemption history.
detail.financeBody: The system calculates each share automatically on redemption.
detail.emptyRedemptionsTitle: This promo code has not been used yet.
detail.emptyRedemptionsBody: Redemption history will appear here after the first successful payment capture.

errors.generic: Could not save the promo code right now.
errors.invalidCode: Enter a code with only letters, numbers, dash, or underscore.
errors.invalidDateRange: The promo code date range is invalid.
errors.usageLimitBelowCurrentUsage: The usage limit cannot be lower than the number of redemptions already recorded.
errors.notPractitioner: Only practitioner accounts can manage promo codes.
errors.notFound: That promo code was not found.

sections.upcomingSubtitle: Scheduled sessions and anything waiting to start.
sections.activeSubtitle: Sessions ready to join now or already in progress.

detail.title: Session details
detail.messagesReadOnly: You can review the session messages if they are available.
detail.openMessagesError: Could not open session messages right now.
detail.runtimeBody: This screen uses the real practitioner prepare and join contracts from the backend. A room link only opens if the contract explicitly allows it.
detail.preparePending: Prepare request was sent, but the runtime is not ready yet.
detail.openRoomReady: The session room is ready to open.
detail.prepareError: The room cannot be prepared right now. Try again closer to the session time.
detail.joinError: Join availability could not be checked right now. Try again in a moment.
detail.openRoomError: The session room could not be opened from this device right now.
detail.closeoutError: The session status could not be updated right now. Try again.

blocked.SESSION_NOT_JOINABLE_STATUS: The current session status does not allow joining.
blocked.SESSION_NOT_VIDEO_MODE: This session is not in video mode.
blocked.SESSION_TIME_WINDOW_NOT_OPEN: The join window is not open yet.
blocked.SESSION_RUNTIME_NOT_PREPARED: The session runtime is not prepared yet.
blocked.SESSION_JOIN_WINDOW_CLOSED: The join window for this session has already closed.

detail.completedFeedback: The session was marked as completed.
detail.noShowFeedback: The session was marked as no show.

stateNote.PENDING_PAYMENT: This session is still waiting for payment, so there is no direct action for you right now.
stateNote.PENDING_PRACTITIONER_RESPONSE: This session is waiting for your confirmation or for the system to move it to the next state.
stateNote.UPCOMING_NEEDS_PREPARE: Prepare the session room before the join window opens.
stateNote.READY_TO_JOIN_CLOSED: The join window for this session has ended.
stateNote.IN_PROGRESS_OPEN: You can open the session room now.
stateNote.NO_SHOW: The session was marked as no-show.
stateNote.REFUND_PENDING: This session is in a pending refund state, so there are no direct actions now.
stateNote.REFUNDED: The refund for this session has already been processed, so there are no direct actions now.
stateNote.UNAVAILABLE: The session is not available right now.
stateNote.DEFAULT: This session does not expose a direct action from this screen right now.

nextStep.waitForPayment: Wait for payment to finish before any operational step.
nextStep.waitForConfirmation: Check back when the session moves into a confirmed appointment state.
nextStep.waitForWindow: Come back near the appointment time to see whether the join window has opened.
nextStep.prepareRoom: Prepare the room first, then check whether joining is available.
nextStep.checkJoin: Check join access now to see whether the session can be opened.
nextStep.openRoom: Open the room and continue with the patient.
nextStep.reviewOnly: Review the details only. There is no further operational step right now.

actionSummary.openRoom: You can open the session room now without any extra step.
actionSummary.prepareRoom: The clearest next action right now is to prepare the session room.
actionSummary.checkJoin: Check join access to confirm whether the room can be opened right now.
actionSummary.closeout: You can update the session outcome if it has ended or if the patient did not attend.
actionSummary.messages: You can open the session messages now and review the linked conversation.
actionSummary.none: This screen reflects the current backend truth, but there is no operational action required right now.

closeoutSummary.COMPLETED: This session is already completed and does not need another closeout update.
closeoutSummary.NO_SHOW: This session is already marked as no-show and does not need another update.
closeoutSummary.CLOSED: This session is already effectively closed, so there is no further closeout action.
closeoutSummary.NOT_READY: Closeout actions only appear when the session reaches a state that allows them.

availability.title: Availability and presence
availability.overviewBody: Keep your live status, weekly hours, and temporary changes easy to understand.
availability.presenceBody: Choose how patients should see you right now. This does not change your weekly hours.
availability.instantBookingBody: Allow or stop instant booking without changing your weekly hours.
availability.instantBookingEnabled: Instant booking is currently on for cases the system allows.
availability.instantBookingDisabled: Instant booking is currently off, so new instant requests will not reach you.
availability.scheduleBody: Set your repeating working hours here. Patients see the windows created from this schedule.
availability.timezoneUnavailable: Time labels are shown using the device until timezone data is available.
availability.emptySchedule: You have not set any weekly hours yet.
availability.saveHint: Make your changes, then save the full week in one step.
availability.saveSuccess: The weekly schedule was saved successfully.
availability.saveError: The weekly schedule could not be saved right now.
availability.exceptionsBody: Use a block when you need time off, or open extra hours outside your weekly schedule.
availability.emptyExceptions: There are no active exceptions right now.
availability.exceptionTimeHint: Use local date and time, like 2026-04-25 14:00
availability.exceptionSaveError: The exception could not be saved right now.
availability.exceptionDeleteError: The exception could not be removed right now.

validation.invalidTime: Enter time in a valid format like 09:00.
validation.endAfterStart: The end time must be after the start time.
validation.overlap: This slot overlaps with another slot on the same day.
validation.exceptionDatesRequired: Enter both the exception start and end time.
validation.invalidDateTime: Enter a valid date and time, like 2026-04-25 14:00.

paymentStatuses.UNKNOWN: Payment status is not clear right now

accessLockedReasons.PAYMENT_PENDING: Access links will appear after payment is confirmed.
accessLockedReasons.PAYMENT_FAILED: Access is not available because payment has not been completed yet.

accessLockedReasons.ENROLLMENT_REFUNDED: This enrollment was refunded, so access links are no longer available.

accessLockedReasons.DEFAULT: Access will appear here when it becomes available.

enrollment.paymentReturnPendingSubtitle: You can continue the payment now and unlock access after it is confirmed.
enrollment.paymentReturnProcessingSubtitle: We are checking the payment right now.
enrollment.paymentReturnProcessingNote: Please wait a moment while we confirm the payment with the provider.
enrollment.paymentReturnVerifyingSubtitle: We are confirming the payment now. This may take a moment.
enrollment.paymentReturnSuccessSubtitle: Your enrollment is active, and access is now available.
enrollment.paymentReturnSuccessActionsTitle: What would you like to do next?
enrollment.paymentReturnSuccessActionsSubtitle: You can review the enrollment or open the program now.
enrollment.paymentReturnFailedSubtitle: The payment did not go through. You can try again.
enrollment.paymentReturnExpiredSubtitle: This payment attempt expired. Tap Complete payment to start a new one.
enrollment.paymentReturnUnavailableSubtitle: We could not create a new payment attempt right now. Please try again later or contact support.
enrollment.paymentReturnCancelledSubtitle: The checkout was closed before the payment was completed.
enrollment.paymentReturnSupportNote: If you keep running into trouble, contact support and we will help you continue.
enrollment.paymentReturnOpenFailedTitle: Could not open the payment page
enrollment.paymentReturnOpenFailedSubtitle: Please press Complete payment again. If the problem continues, try another browser or contact support.

home.subtitle: Book a session today with a practitioner who is available now.

errors.genericHeading: We could not start instant booking
